name: should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
description: Test case for should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)), "t53be5d09f3bae7e63624a0ff0b8f4817" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t87429e7cec7267d49251da953f9cba5d" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."motion" = true group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t586e4ee849fa876237bce72e3895898f" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."play_action" = true group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t530b9f3ac602941bff6af97d0185001e" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (1, 2) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score" AS "espn_open_score_0", "t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", "t53be5d09f3bae7e63624a0ff0b8f4817"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", "t87429e7cec7267d49251da953f9cba5d"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_1", "t586e4ee849fa876237bce72e3895898f"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_2", "t530b9f3ac602941bff6af97d0185001e"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_3", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player"."pid" and player_seasonlogs.year = player_years.year and player_seasonlogs.year IN (2023,2022) and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62" on "t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62.year = player_years.year and t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62.year IN (2022,2023) left join "t53be5d09f3bae7e63624a0ff0b8f4817" on "t53be5d09f3bae7e63624a0ff0b8f4817"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t53be5d09f3bae7e63624a0ff0b8f4817.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "t87429e7cec7267d49251da953f9cba5d" on "t87429e7cec7267d49251da953f9cba5d"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t87429e7cec7267d49251da953f9cba5d.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "t586e4ee849fa876237bce72e3895898f" on "t586e4ee849fa876237bce72e3895898f"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t586e4ee849fa876237bce72e3895898f.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "t530b9f3ac602941bff6af97d0185001e" on "t530b9f3ac602941bff6af97d0185001e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t530b9f3ac602941bff6af97d0185001e.year = player_years.year + -1 where player.pos IN ('WR') and player_seasonlogs.espn_open_score > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score", "t77050378daf49ab21d9b6597414e1e62"."trg_from_plays", "t53be5d09f3bae7e63624a0ff0b8f4817"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "t87429e7cec7267d49251da953f9cba5d"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "t586e4ee849fa876237bce72e3895898f"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "t530b9f3ac602941bff6af97d0185001e"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
